pending.body: `src/cli/project.rs:2892-2912` drops a direct dependency/dependent from `## Nearby work` whenever its fresh `br show` detail is missing, even if the focal bead already carries that relation's id/title/status and `br list` supplied a summary. In the degraded paths this branch explicitly tries to support (`br list` unavailable, transient `br show` failure), the prompt can therefore render `No nearby open work was found.` while the old dependency block still lists those beads. Because final-review planned-elsewhere routing only allowlists IDs extracted from `Nearby work` / `Already Planned Elsewhere` (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:467-470`), those omitted direct relations can no longer be mapped as planned-elsewhere. Fall back to relation/summary data for direct nearby entries when detail refresh is unavailable, and use fresh detail only to override stale status/description when it exists.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 18 -> Plan and Implement
